---
title: "Reproduction of Figure 3"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: yes
    number_sections: yes
    code_folding: show
---

# Setup and Libraries

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(recoRdseq)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(S4Vectors)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(ggrepel)
library(grid)

input_file <- knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE)
if (is.null(input_file) || !nzchar(input_file)) {
  script_dir <- normalizePath(getwd(), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
} else {
  script_dir <- dirname(normalizePath(input_file, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
}
project_dir <- normalizePath(file.path(script_dir, ".."), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)

Fig.Folder <- file.path(project_dir, "Outputs", "Figure_3")
dir.create(Fig.Folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

input_dir <- file.path(project_dir, "Inputs")
meta_file <- file.path(input_dir, "metaData.txt")
counts_gene_file <- file.path(input_dir, "genomeCounts.txt")
counts_tu_file <- file.path(input_dir, "genomeCounts_TU.txt")
summary_gene_file <- file.path(input_dir, "genomeCounts.txt.summary")
summary_tu_file <- file.path(input_dir, "genomeCounts_TU.txt.summary")
map_file <- file.path(input_dir, "TU_gene_mapping.tsv")

stopifnot(file.exists(meta_file), file.exists(counts_gene_file), file.exists(counts_tu_file),
          file.exists(summary_gene_file), file.exists(summary_tu_file), file.exists(map_file))

cat("Project directory:", project_dir, "\n")
cat("Figure output directory:", Fig.Folder, "\n")

method_palette <- c("Gene-based" = "#542ABC", "TU-based" = "#ABC542")
treatment_palette <- c("Starch" = "#42bb7f", "Fat" = "#ed915c")
```

# 1. Build Two recoRdseq Objects

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Object 1: genomeCounts (gene-resolution)
rec_gene <- recoRdseq.input(
  genome_counts = counts_gene_file,
  sample_metadata = meta_file
)

# Object 2: genomeCounts_TU (TU-resolution)
rec_tu <- recoRdseq.input(
  genome_counts = counts_tu_file,
  sample_metadata = meta_file
)

# Force explicit contrast direction: Fat vs Starch (Starch is reference)
colData(rec_gene)$Treatment <- factor(as.character(colData(rec_gene)$Treatment), levels = c("Starch", "Fat"))
colData(rec_tu)$Treatment <- factor(as.character(colData(rec_tu)$Treatment), levels = c("Starch", "Fat"))

# Preprocess and transform each object
rec_gene_pp <- recoRdseq.preprocess(
  rec_gene,
  min_sample_counts = 3000,
  remove_low_count_feature_percent = 25,
  group_by = "Treatment",
  outlier_z_threshold = 3,
  outlier_z_method = "median",
  outlier_side = "low",
  outlier_min_deficit_fraction = 0.25
)

rec_tu_pp <- recoRdseq.preprocess(
  rec_tu,
  min_sample_counts = 1000,
  remove_low_count_feature_percent = 25,
  group_by = "Treatment",
  outlier_z_threshold = 3,
  outlier_z_method = "median",
  outlier_side = "low",
  outlier_min_deficit_fraction = 0.25
)

rec_gene_norm <- recoRdseq.transform(rec_gene_pp, method = "rlog", normalize_by = "Treatment")
rec_tu_norm <- recoRdseq.transform(rec_tu_pp, method = "rlog", normalize_by = "Treatment")

cat("Gene object dimensions:", nrow(rec_gene_norm), "features x", ncol(rec_gene_norm), "samples\n")
cat("TU object dimensions:", nrow(rec_tu_norm), "features x", ncol(rec_tu_norm), "samples\n")
```

# 2. Figure 3A: Assigned Spacer Counts (Gene vs TU)

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
summary_gene <- read.delim(summary_gene_file, check.names = FALSE)
summary_tu <- read.delim(summary_tu_file, check.names = FALSE)

assigned_gene <- summary_gene %>%
  dplyr::filter(Status == "Assigned") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = -Status, names_to = "Sequencing_ID", values_to = "assigned_counts") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Method = "Gene-based")

assigned_tu <- summary_tu %>%
  dplyr::filter(Status == "Assigned") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = -Status, names_to = "Sequencing_ID", values_to = "assigned_counts") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Method = "TU-based")

meta_tbl <- as.data.frame(colData(rec_gene))
meta_tbl$Sequencing_ID <- rownames(meta_tbl)

assigned_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(assigned_gene, assigned_tu) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(meta_tbl %>% dplyr::select(Sequencing_ID, Treatment), by = "Sequencing_ID")

assigned_stats <- assigned_all %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Method) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_counts = mean(assigned_counts, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_counts = sd(assigned_counts, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_3a <- ggplot(assigned_stats, aes(x = Method, y = mean_counts, fill = Method)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = pmax(0, mean_counts - sd_counts), ymax = mean_counts + sd_counts),
                width = 0.18, linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = method_palette, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Assigned spacers") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

grDevices::pdf(file.path(Fig.Folder, "Figure_3A.pdf"), width = 2.4, height = 5.8, pointsize = 14)
print(p_3a)
dev.off()

p_3a_sample <- ggplot(assigned_all, aes(x = Sequencing_ID, y = assigned_counts, fill = Method)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.72) +
  facet_wrap(~Treatment, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = method_palette, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Sample", y = "Assigned spacers", fill = "Method") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

grDevices::pdf(file.path(Fig.Folder, "Figure_3A_perSample.pdf"), width = 8.6, height = 5.6, pointsize = 12)
print(p_3a_sample)
dev.off()
```

# 3. Differential Abundance with recoRdseq (DESeq2 + edgeR)

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
rec_gene_de <- recoRdseq.DE(
  rec_gene_norm,
  model_design = "~Treatment",
  de_methods = c("DESeq2", "edgeR"),
  compare_by = "Treatment",
  deseq2_test = "Wald"
)

rec_tu_de <- recoRdseq.DE(
  rec_tu_norm,
  model_design = "~Treatment",
  de_methods = c("DESeq2", "edgeR"),
  compare_by = "Treatment",
  deseq2_test = "Wald"
)

gene_deseq <- as.data.frame(metadata(rec_gene_de)$DESeq2_results)
gene_edger <- as.data.frame(metadata(rec_gene_de)$edgeR_results)
tu_deseq <- as.data.frame(metadata(rec_tu_de)$DESeq2_results)
tu_edger <- as.data.frame(metadata(rec_tu_de)$edgeR_results)

knitr::kable(head(gene_deseq, 8), caption = "Gene-based DESeq2 head")
knitr::kable(head(tu_deseq, 8), caption = "TU-based DESeq2 head")

write.csv(gene_deseq[order(gene_deseq$pvalue), ],
          file.path(Fig.Folder, "DESeq2_Gene_based_Fat_vs_Starch_sorted_by_pvalue.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tu_deseq[order(tu_deseq$pvalue), ],
          file.path(Fig.Folder, "DESeq2_TU_based_Fat_vs_Starch_sorted_by_pvalue.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(gene_edger[order(gene_edger$PValue), ],
          file.path(Fig.Folder, "edgeR_Gene_based_Fat_vs_Starch_sorted_by_pvalue.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tu_edger[order(tu_edger$PValue), ],
          file.path(Fig.Folder, "edgeR_TU_based_Fat_vs_Starch_sorted_by_pvalue.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```

# 4. Plots

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gene_deg_intersect <- recoRdseq.filterDEG(
  rec_gene_de,
  de_methods = c("DESeq2", "edgeR"),
  combine_methods = "intersect",
  max_adjusted_p_value = 0.05
)

tu_deg_intersect <- recoRdseq.filterDEG(
  rec_tu_de,
  de_methods = c("DESeq2", "edgeR"),
  combine_methods = "intersect",
  max_adjusted_p_value = 0.05
)

cat("Gene intersect DEGs:", length(gene_deg_intersect), "\n")
cat("TU intersect DEGs:", length(tu_deg_intersect), "\n")

# Volcano (DESeq2 coordinates)
p_gene_volcano <- recoRdseq.plot(
  rec_gene_de,
  plot_types = "volcano",
  color_by = "Treatment",
  volcano_de_method = "DESeq2",
  max_adjusted_p_value = 0.05,
  min_abs_log2_fold_change = 0.5,
  group_color_map = treatment_palette
)$volcano

p_tu_volcano <- recoRdseq.plot(
  rec_tu_de,
  plot_types = "volcano",
  color_by = "Treatment",
  volcano_de_method = "DESeq2",
  max_adjusted_p_value = 0.05,
  min_abs_log2_fold_change = 0.5,
  group_color_map = treatment_palette
)$volcano

grDevices::pdf(file.path(Fig.Folder, "Figure_3_Gene_volcano.pdf"), width = 6.2, height = 5.4, pointsize = 12)
print(p_gene_volcano)
dev.off()

grDevices::pdf(file.path(Fig.Folder, "Figure_3_TU_volcano.pdf"), width = 6.2, height = 5.4, pointsize = 12)
print(p_tu_volcano)
dev.off()

# Heatmaps from intersection hits
p_gene_heatmap <- recoRdseq.plotHeatmap(
  rec_gene_de,
  color_by = "Treatment",
  heatmap_feature_source = "deg",
  heatmap_de_methods = c("DESeq2", "edgeR"),
  heatmap_combine_methods = "intersect",
  heatmap_max_adjusted_p_value = 0.05,
  heatmap_n_features = 40,
  group_color_map = treatment_palette
)

p_tu_heatmap <- recoRdseq.plotHeatmap(
  rec_tu_de,
  color_by = "Treatment",
  heatmap_feature_source = "deg",
  heatmap_de_methods = c("DESeq2", "edgeR"),
  heatmap_combine_methods = "intersect",
  heatmap_max_adjusted_p_value = 0.05,
  heatmap_n_features = 40,
  group_color_map = treatment_palette
)

grDevices::pdf(file.path(Fig.Folder, "Figure_3_Gene_heatmap.pdf"), width = 5.6, height = 7.2, pointsize = 12)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(p_gene_heatmap$gtable)
dev.off()

grDevices::pdf(file.path(Fig.Folder, "Figure_3_TU_heatmap.pdf"), width = 5.6, height = 7.2, pointsize = 12)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(p_tu_heatmap$gtable)
dev.off()

# Feature plots from top intersection hits
gene_feature_ids <- head(gene_deg_intersect, 10)
if (length(gene_feature_ids) == 0) {
  gene_feature_ids <- head(rownames(assay(rec_gene_de, "normCounts")), 10)
}

p_gene_features <- recoRdseq.plotFeatures(
  rec_gene_de,
  feature_ids = gene_feature_ids,
  color_by = "Treatment",
  group_color_map = treatment_palette
)

grDevices::pdf(file.path(Fig.Folder, "Figure_3_Gene_features.pdf"), width = 8.2, height = 5.8, pointsize = 12)
print(p_gene_features)
dev.off()

tu_feature_ids <- head(tu_deg_intersect, 10)
if (length(tu_feature_ids) == 0) {
  tu_feature_ids <- head(rownames(assay(rec_tu_de, "normCounts")), 10)
}

p_tu_features <- recoRdseq.plotFeatures(
  rec_tu_de,
  feature_ids = tu_feature_ids,
  color_by = "Treatment",
  group_color_map = treatment_palette
)

grDevices::pdf(file.path(Fig.Folder, "Figure_3_TU_features.pdf"), width = 8.2, height = 5.8, pointsize = 12)
print(p_tu_features)
dev.off()
```

# 5. Figure 3B: TU vs Gene Significance Comparison

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
tu_map_raw <- readr::read_tsv(map_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

tu_map_long <- tu_map_raw %>%
  dplyr::transmute(TU = trimws(as.character(Name)), Genes = as.character(Genes)) %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(Genes, sep = ",") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(geneID = trimws(Genes)) %>%
  dplyr::select(geneID, TU) %>%
  dplyr::filter(nzchar(geneID), nzchar(TU)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

gene_sig <- gene_deseq %>% dplyr::select(geneID, padj_gene = padj)
tu_sig <- tu_deseq %>% dplyr::transmute(TU = geneID, padj_tu = padj)

plot_df <- tu_map_long %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(gene_sig, by = "geneID") %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(tu_sig, by = "TU") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(padj_gene), !is.na(padj_tu), padj_gene > 0, padj_tu > 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    neglog10_padj_gene = -log10(padj_gene),
    neglog10_padj_tu = -log10(padj_tu)
  )

tus_to_highlight <- c("fruBKA", "kdgT", "caiTABCDE")
plot_df_high <- plot_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(TU %in% tus_to_highlight) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(gene_label = gsub("\\d+$", "", gsub("_.*$", "", geneID)))

max_lim <- max(plot_df$neglog10_padj_gene, plot_df$neglog10_padj_tu, -log10(0.05), na.rm = TRUE)

p_3b <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = neglog10_padj_gene, y = neglog10_padj_tu)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.65, size = 2, color = "black") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_point(data = plot_df_high, color = "darkred", size = 2.2) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = plot_df_high,
    aes(label = gene_label),
    color = "darkred",
    size = 4.2,
    box.padding = 0.4,
    point.padding = 0,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    seed = 1
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, max_lim), ylim = c(0, max_lim)) +
  labs(
    x = expression(-log[10]("padj (gene-based)")),
    y = expression(-log[10]("padj (TU-based)")),
    title = ""
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)

grDevices::pdf(file.path(Fig.Folder, "Figure_3B.pdf"), width = 4.2, height = 6, pointsize = 14)
print(p_3b)
dev.off()
```
